---
name: Contribution: reference file or asset
about: Submit a new reference file, asset, or extension for one of the skills
title: "[CONTRIBUTION] "
labels: contribution
assignees: ''
---

**What are you contributing?**
- [ ] Reference file (guides, examples, frameworks)
- [ ] Asset (templates, style variants, format extensions)
- [ ] Industry-specific extension
- [ ] Localization (language support)
- [ ] Career changer intake extension
- [ ] Other (describe below)

**Which skill folder does this belong in?**
- [ ] skill-01-interviewer/references
- [ ] skill-01-interviewer/assets
- [ ] skill-02-resume-writer/references
- [ ] skill-02-resume-writer/assets
- [ ] skill-03-job-search/references
- [ ] skill-03-job-search/assets
- [ ] skill-04-interview-prep/references
- [ ] skill-04-interview-prep/assets
- [ ] skill-05-mock-interviewer/references
- [ ] skill-05-mock-interviewer/assets
- [ ] skill-06-pipeline-dashboard/references
- [ ] skill-06-pipeline-dashboard/assets

**What does this file do?**
Describe what the file contains, what problem it solves, and when Claude should load it.

**Who does this help?**
Describe the specific user population or use case this serves. For example: veterans transitioning to civilian roles, candidates in regulated industries, non-US job seekers.

**Attribution and licensing**
Confirm that this contribution is your original work and that you agree to release it under the CC BY-NC 4.0 license that governs this package.

- [ ] This is my original work
- [ ] I agree to release this under CC BY-NC 4.0
- [ ] I have credited any sources used within the file itself

**Has this been tested?**
Describe how you validated that the file produces the intended behavior when loaded by the skill. Even informal testing notes are helpful.

**Additional context**
Any other information that would help evaluate and integrate this contribution.
